name: D'Regen
tagline: Highest ORAC Antioxidant Value in the Market
benefits: Support healthy gene & boost liver function
Detoxify, promote weight loss & suppress 3 highs
Defend against UV damage & improve skin radiance
ingredients: Mangosteen, Broccoli Sprouts, Apple Stem Cells, Grape Stem Cells, Yeast Beta-Glucan, Acerola Cherry, Amla, Pomegranate, Blueberry, Raspberry, Acai, Blackcurrant, Elderberry, Green Tea, Goji Berries.
scientificHighlight: Verified by Gifu International Biotechnology Research Japan: Mangosteen extract kills a large number of cancer cells within 2 minutes.
usage: Mix 1 sachet with 100ml of water. Take daily.

name: D'Jeune
tagline: Soul Enriching Nourishment for Healthy Skin and Joints
benefits: Improves skin elasticity, reduces wrinkles & fine lines
Regulates blood sugar & aids weight management
ingredients: Hokkaido Cherry Blossom, French Cantaloupe (SOD), Deep-Sea Collagen Peptides, Prebiotics, Acerola Cherry.
scientificHighlight: Rich in SOD (Superoxide Dismutase) – a powerful antioxidant that eliminates free radicals.
usage: Mix 1 sachet with 50ml of water. Take 1–2 sachets daily before meals.

name: I-Bright Mix Fruit Jelly
tagline: The Ultimate Shield to the Window of your Soul
benefits: Reduces risk of AMD (Age-related Macular Degeneration)
ingredients: Blackcurrant, Goji Berry, Bilberry, Lutein, Zeaxanthin, Astaxanthin, Vitamins A, B, C, E, Zinc, Copper, Selenium.
scientificHighlight: Astaxanthin has 6,000x the antioxidant capacity of Vitamin C.
usage: Consume 1–2 jellies daily, preferably after meals.

name: Cordyceps Plus Ganoderma
benefits: Regulates immune system & reduces risk of infections
Increases oxygen in the body & fights fatigue
Relaxes airway smooth muscle for better breathing
ingredients: Cordyceps Militaris Extract, Ganoderma Lucidum Extract.
scientificHighlight: Used for over 2,000 years in Asian countries as the 'Mushroom of Immortality'.
usage: Take 2 capsules daily after meals (or 4 for best results).

name: DnG Spirulina
tagline: The algae plant with the richest & most comprehensive nutrition
benefits: Removes heavy metals from the body
ingredients: 100% California-grown natural Spirulina. Non-GMO, vegan, gluten-free.
scientificHighlight: 1 serving = antioxidant content of 3–4 servings of fruits & vegetables.
usage: Adults: Chew 5–15 tablets daily before meals. Children (6-12): Half dose.

name: Gano Inn
ingredients: Premium Arabica coffee, Ganoderma lucidum extract.
scientificHighlight: Known as the 'Mushroom of Immortality' in Eastern tradition. Backed by modern science for remarkable health benefits.
usage: Dissolve 1 sachet in 120ml hot water. Stir well and enjoy.

name: Grand Café
ingredients: Premium Arabica coffee, Tongkat Ali, Ginseng, Maca extract.
scientificHighlight: A powerful blend of three ancient herbs: Tongkat Ali (Malaysia Ginseng), Ginseng, and Maca – revered for generations.
usage: Dissolve 1 sachet in 120ml hot water. Stir well and enjoy.

name: DRevive Beauty Mattress
tagline: Good Health Begins with Quality Deep Sleep
benefits: Strengthens heart function & lowers risk of heart failure
ingredients: Innovative bedsheet integrating Negative Electric Potential, 7.8 Hz frequency, Terahertz waves, Negative Ions, and Far-Infrared rays.
scientificHighlight: A large-scale US study found that sleeping less than 7 hours or having poor sleep quality significantly increases disease risk.
usage: Use as a bedsheet for optimal sleep quality. Not advised for individuals with metal implants, pacemakers, or pregnant women.

name: DC Wave
tagline: Clear The Meridians, Feel the Blood, Renew The Body
ingredients: Far-Infrared, Ultra-Long Wave, and Magnetic Acupuncture Technology.
scientificHighlight: Magnetic Acupuncture penetrates deep into cells and bones, enhancing treatment effects through magnetic fields.
usage: Ergonomically shaped to fit body contours. Use on targeted areas for pain relief and muscle recovery.

name: Penta-Core Water Activator
ingredients: Patented technology with terahertz resonance. Transforms clustered water into a linear structure for better cellular absorption.
scientificHighlight: 6x water absorption rate. The human body is ~70% water – but not all water is absorbed. Penta-Core optimizes water structure for cellular hydration.
usage: Use with drinking water. Also great for mixing formula milk, cooking rice, brewing tea, washing face.

name: DnG SUSO
ingredients: Hydrogen-rich water with up to 1,600 ppb hydrogen concentration.
scientificHighlight: Hydrogen can neutralize millions of free radicals. It's the smallest and most potent antioxidant molecule.
usage: Drink daily for powerful antioxidant protection with zero side effects.

name: Dyna Chlorophyll
tagline: Power your day with chlorophyll, Begin your green energy journey!
benefits: Eliminates bad breath and body odor
ingredients: Alfalfa extract – contains 4 times more chlorophyll than ordinary vegetables.
scientificHighlight: 1 tablespoon of Dyna Chlorophyll concentrate equals the nutritional value of 1 kg of vegetables.
usage: Mix 1 tablespoon (15ml) with a glass of water. Take twice daily.

name: GinPlus
tagline: Let It Power Up Your Life, To Live in Young & Energetic!
ingredients: Ginkgo Biloba, Tongkat Ali (Malaysia Ginseng), Panax Ginseng.
scientificHighlight: Ginkgo leaf has the highest practice in Western healthcare. Tongkat Ali contains 108 active ingredients. Panax Ginseng contains 28 types of ginsenosides.
usage: Take 2 capsules two times daily after meals.

name: Smart-ION Series
tagline: Your Trendy, Ultralight, Eye Protection & Wellness Wear
benefits: Filters blue light & relieves eye fatigue
Far-infrared penetration up to 5cm into skin
Improves blood circulation & reduces muscle fatigue
ingredients: Tourmaline-infused through Japan Nanotechnology, Nano Silver Coating, TR90 shape-memory material.
scientificHighlight: Tourmaline releases far-infrared and high-density negative ions. Each piece permanently releases 1,000+ ions/cc.
usage: Available as eyewear, leggings, handsleeves, socks, and headscarf. Wear daily for continuous wellness benefits.
